message:
fix(resize_scheduler): fix superseded_by_seq field name and invalid _ expr (ft-3681t.5.3.1)

- Line 1058: by_seq -> superseded_by_seq to match ActiveCancelledSuperseded struct
- Line 3172: Replace _ with i in for loop (invalid expression placeholder)

These compile blockers were blocking cargo check --all-targets for
multiple agents working on ft-3681t.5.3 sandbox zone execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
